name: Baldy's Full Swing Indoor Golf
about: Baldy's Full Swing Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Warren, PA. It offers virtual golf experiences across multiple bays with a focus on providing a convenient and flexible environment for golfers. The venue allows for booking sessions of varying lengths from one hour to four hours, with pricing structured by the hour for any party size. It caters to a diverse range of golfers, from solo practitioners to larger groups, and features on-site food and beverage service. The facility emphasizes a casual and welcoming atmosphere, making it suitable for both casual play and competitive leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Flat rate pricing for any party size, making it cost-effective for groups
Ability to order food and drinks directly to your golf bay, maximizing play time
Flexible booking options for various time slots, from 1 to 4 hours
Regular tournaments and weekly leagues for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Wings, burgers, and other food available from The Cornerstone Lounge
Cold beer and other drinks available from The Cornerstone Lounge

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice for simulator venues to provide clubs for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site food and drink service from The Cornerstone Lounge that can be ordered directly to your bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Booking times range from 1 to 4 hours, depending on the package chosen, which can accommodate a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the casual atmosphere, flat-rate pricing for any party size, and availability of food make it suitable for families and kids.
